catalog.reason: Catalog/package parity is blocked because dist/catalog.json and dist/catalog.md disagree on skill and risk counts, and the CI-backed catalog refresh path exists but has not been executed or verified.
catalog.action: Execute the catalog refresh workflow or run npm run build:catalog from a checked-out repository, then verify dist/catalog.json, dist/catalog.md, dist/install-manifest.json, and reports agree before Packager or Publisher endorsement.
